_README: AI Bill of Materials (AIBOM) template — a machine-readable inventory of every model, prompt, tool, plugin, connector, MCP server, library, dataset, and API in the agentic system, with version and provenance; replace every <placeholder> with real values, then delete this _README, _controls, _meta, and _guidance block so the committed aibom.json is a clean machine-readable inventory.
_controls: SUP-01 — Maintain AI bill of materials

_guidance._note: Delete this whole _guidance block once the AIBOM is filled in. It explains each section and how it backs the controls; it is not part of the evidence record.
_guidance.scope: List EVERY component the agent can load or call at runtime — including the 'libraries' section, which a banking/regulated service will always have. An entry missing here is an untracked component (SUP-01 gap) and an unpinned/unverified supply-chain risk (SUP-02/SUP-04, risk AGT-12). Do not silently drop a category: populate it, or leave it [] only if the system genuinely has none.

fields.version: A pinned identifier (semver tag, digest, or content hash) — never 'latest' or a floating tag (SUP-04). For hosted models/services, prefer an immutable id (model digest or dated snapshot id). A mutable gateway alias (e.g. 'prod-chat') is a floating pointer and is allowed ONLY if it is frozen and you set 'pin_immutable' (the underlying immutable id) plus 'pin_freeze_ref' (the freeze/attestation/change-review record); an alias with no freeze reference fails SUP-04.
fields.pin_immutable: Optional. When 'version' is a mutable alias, record the underlying immutable id the alias is frozen to (digest / dated snapshot). Omit when 'version' is already immutable.
fields.pin_freeze_ref: Optional. When 'version' is a mutable alias, reference the documented freeze / attestation / change-review record that pins the alias (SUP-04). Required alongside 'pin_immutable' for an alias to be acceptable.
fields.source: Where the component comes from: registry, repo path, or URL of record.
fields.provenance: The signature, attestation, or verification record proving authenticity and integrity (SUP-02). Reference the artifact, e.g. a cosign signature, SLSA attestation, or signed digest.
fields.approved: Boolean string: 'true' only if the component passed the documented approval/verification gate before deployment (SUP-02). Anything 'false' must not be deployed.
fields.risk: Component risk rating used to prioritize review, e.g. 'low' / 'medium' / 'high'.

_guidance.empty_arrays: Sections left as [] (plugins, connectors, mcpServers, libraries, datasets, apis) MUST be empty because the system genuinely has none — not because they were not checked. If a category exists, populate it (libraries in particular are rarely genuinely empty).
_guidance.delete_before_evidence: Remove _README, _controls, _meta, and this _guidance object so the committed aibom.json is a clean machine-readable inventory.

models.name: <model name>
models.version: <immutable id preferred; mutable gateway alias only with pin_immutable + pin_freeze_ref>
models.pin_immutable: <underlying immutable id if version is a mutable alias, else omit>
models.pin_freeze_ref: <freeze/attestation/change-review record if version is a mutable alias, else omit>
